data.content:
// File: docs/issues/vunderstory-bootstrap-harness/S003-product-registry-project-switcher.md
---
id: S003
title: "Product Registry And Project Switcher"
type: AFK
status: done
parent: "https://github.com/usorama/vunderstory/issues/1"
blocked_by: [S001, S002]
tracks: [O1, O3, OUT1, C1, C2, C3, C10, C11, C12, FR1, FR2, FR28, NFR1, NFR4, AC2, AC17]
---

## What to build

Add a local Product Registry and Codex-like project switcher. A founder should
see multiple products or projects in the left navigation and open one selected
workspace without understanding repository mechanics.

Each project must expose its own conversation history, similar to Codex:
active conversation, recent conversations, timestamps/status, and search/filter
controls. Reopening a conversation restores the conversation context while
leaving PRD/work/evidence as durable project truth.

## Traceability

- Objectives: O1, O3
- Outcomes: OUT1, OUT2
- Capabilities: C1, C2, C3, C10, C11, C12
- User stories: US3, US4, US22, US25
- Functional requirements: FR1, FR2, FR28
- Non-functional requirements: NFR1, NFR4

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Product and project records include owner, repo paths, risk profile, and selected PRD.
- [x] The left navigation can switch between at least two local project fixtures.
- [x] The selected project workspace updates without losing local state.
- [x] Project conversation fixtures are grouped under their owning project and
  include title, status, timestamp, summary, and linked PRD/work/evidence refs.
- [x] Search/filter can find an old conversation within the selected project.

## Verification

- [x] Structural check: product registry contract is documented or typed.
- [x] Automated test: project switch fixture changes selected project state.
- [x] Runtime/manual proof: browser proof of switching between projects.
- [x] Runtime/manual proof: browser proof of finding and reopening an old
  conversation under a project.
- [x] PR-zero evidence required: screenshot or trace
